title: Rage's Vanilla+
description: This is the ultimate Vanilla+ Experience
body:
Welcome to the **Ultimate Vanilla+** experience! This modpack is packed with goodies, including a Shader and multiple texturepacks like _Fresh Animations_. This pack also has optimization mods to use high performance mods such as _Dropz_ or the _Physics mod_ (**If you want the Pro version you have to manually download it from the Internet: [Download Pro Version](https://c10.patreonusercontent.com/4/patreon-media/p/post/105510754/a98a1c24b8144bed9287dab99a5aeed9/eyJhIjoxLCJwIjoxfQ%3D%3D/1?token-time=1719014400&token-hash=SyvVSSE16QStE9D9kpabu_aa1BkqlSynjQ-GLlsUMfo%3D)**). **Feel free** to customize your experience by adjusting settings or disabling mods as you see fit. **Have a lot of Fun using this and have a great day!**
‚Äé‚Äé
‚Äé
‚Äé‚Äé ‚Äé
‚Äé 


‚Äé 
‚Äé 
### My Tip for better FPS:

- turn off VSync immediately (from 48 to 96 FPS)

- Render distance to 10 Chunks and
Simulation Distance to 8 Chunks
(from 96 to 112 FPS)
- go to video settings, then to performance, turn off _Use Entity Culling_
- change the shader or/and the settings of the shader however you like
- Please set the RAM to a higher value than the default, about half the RAM your PC has!


### For better Gameplay: 
- Please change the FOV to 90 or higher
- go to the controls and search for Toggle Sail and change the Key from r to h
- using the physics mod and Fresh Animations causes mobs to instantly vanish when killed, instead of the animation (particles)
- **FIX**: Open physics mod settings and disable Mob Ragdoll :D



‚Äé 
‚Äé
‚Äé
# Important!!!

### Enable the _Eyeless Fresh Moves_ and _Fresh Animations_  Resource pack

‚Äé 

### When you create a new world type this in the chat:
```
/function vanilla_refresh:other/actions/other/biome_disable
```
### Type this aswell in Chat:

```
/function vanilla_refresh:other/actions/other/subtitle_disable
```


**If you want you can disable that health display (_see below_) by typing this in chat**

```
/function vanilla_refresh:other/actions/mob/mob_health_disable
```
![Health Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3bb7aef571d510101a6bc262624e080bc3c7a31.png)
